caption: A man wearing glasses, a white collared shirt with a bow tie, and suspenders sits in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio. He wears a large, grey, textured hairpiece on his head and black headphones over his ears. A black microphone is positioned in front of him. In the background, there are framed photos on the wall and clothing displays, including bags and a mannequin wearing a black vest. The logo "GOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" is visible on the screen in two locations. Across the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, speaking and slightly shifting his head and facial expression while looking toward someone off-camera. The background and equipment remain stationary throughout the clip.
